evidence: The amber query vector is the clear focus by brightness and centrality, with periwinkle keys and lilac score bars as supporting context that covary with it.
Only the query, four keys, and their score bars are present — a single coherent system, not five competing novel ideas.
q sits on the amber arrow, k1..k4 sit at their vector tips, and each score bar has its key name directly above it; no legend or swatch key exists.
The only text is the instruction 'Turn q until it lines up with a key.', object labels, the q-degree readout, and the numeric dot-product readouts under each bar — all annotating visible referents.
Labels, the q-degree readout, and the mono numeric readouts are all comfortably legible at all three viewport widths including 375px.
The circle diagram, all vectors, bars, and readouts sit fully inside the frame with margins at 375, 768, and 1280 px.
In aligned-with-k1-1280 the 'q' label and the 'k1' label overlap into an illegible 'kq1' cluster because the query is directly on top of k1.
suggestion: When the query aligns with a key, offset the q label above or below so it never collides with the key's label.

evidence: The query is amber (attention/heat), the keys are periwinkle (observed), and the score bars are lilac (parameters), consistent across all frames with no concept switching color.
Every element — vectors, tips, labels, bars, readouts, and the unit circle — carries propositional content; no mascots or ornaments appear.
Query direction and score height covary readably from stills: at 90deg k2/k3 lead at 0.94, at 30deg k1 leads at 0.98, at 20deg k1 peaks at 1.00, and at 200deg k1 bottoms at -1.00.
Each numeric readout and its bar sit under a matching key name, and vectors carry their labels at their tips.
Across the driven states the query sweeps continuously and bars rise and fall smoothly, reading as a morph rather than cuts.
Generous negative space surrounds the circle and bar row, with a clear top-to-bottom reading order at all widths.
